scenarios.title: Synthesis failure path test function uses correct English spelling

gherkin.given: internal/pipeline/synthesis_subscriber_test.go contains a function with the misspelled token "Flailed"
gherkin.when: the function is renamed from TestSynthesisExtractResponse_FailureMarksFlailed to TestSynthesisExtractResponse_FailureMarksFailed
gherkin.then: grep -rn "Flailed" --include="*.go" . returns zero matches and go test -run TestSynthesisExtractResponse_FailureMarksFailed ./internal/pipeline/... passes and the function body and assertions are unchanged

scenarios.title: Every scenario-manifest linkedTests entry resolves to a real test function

gherkin.given: specs/025-knowledge-synthesis-layer/scenario-manifest.json has 13 stale linkedTests entries across 11 scenarios
gherkin.when: each stale entry is updated to the current function name documented in bug.md and SCN-025-21 file path is updated to internal/telegram/knowledge_test.go
gherkin.then: the Python linkedTests cross-check returns zero MISSING lines and the file count of linkedTests entries is preserved and scenario-manifest.json parses as valid JSON

scenarios.title: Scope 2 DoD preserves the Incremental concept page update behavioral claim

gherkin.given: specs/025-knowledge-synthesis-layer/scopes.md Scope 2 Definition of Done has no item containing 'incremental' or 'preserves existing knowledge'
gherkin.when: a new evidence-cited DoD item 'Incremental concept page update preserves existing knowledge (claims appended not replaced, prior source_artifact_ids retained)' is added
gherkin.then: bash .github/bubbles/scripts/traceability-guard.sh specs/025-knowledge-synthesis-layer no longer fails on SCN-025-05

scenarios.title: Scope 5 DoD preserves the Lint detects contradictions behavioral claim

gherkin.given: specs/025-knowledge-synthesis-layer/scopes.md Scope 5 Definition of Done has no item that contains 'lint detects contradictions'
gherkin.when: a new evidence-cited DoD item 'Lint detects contradictions and emits a high-severity finding referencing both claims and source artifacts' is added
gherkin.then: bash .github/bubbles/scripts/traceability-guard.sh specs/025-knowledge-synthesis-layer no longer fails on SCN-025-14

scenarios.title: Traceability guard returns PASSED for spec 025

gherkin.given: specs/025-knowledge-synthesis-layer/scopes.md Scope 2 and Scope 5 Definitions of Done lack faithful items preserving the SCN-025-05 and SCN-025-14 Gherkin claims
gherkin.when: an evidence-cited DoD item is added to Scope 2 preserving 'Incremental concept page update preserves existing knowledge' and another is added to Scope 5 preserving 'Lint detects contradictions'
gherkin.then: bash .github/bubbles/scripts/traceability-guard.sh specs/025-knowledge-synthesis-layer exits 0 and prints RESULT: PASSED and the G068 summary reports zero unmapped scenarios
